name: 系绳匕首（★） | 深红之网
nameZh: 系绳匕首（★） | 深红之网
descriptionEn: This fixed-blade survival knife is designed to withstand being used as both a weapon and a tool, such as for setting traps, hunting animals or cutting foliage. The handle is wrapped in a length of multi-purpose paracord. It has been painted using a spider web-patterned hydrographic over a red base coat and finished with a semi-gloss topcoat. Be careful where you walk, you never know where the web is spread
descriptionZh: 这把拥有固定刀片的求生刀具为多功能用刀，即可充当武器也可用作工具。比如：可用来布置陷阱，狩猎野兽或砍断树枝。刀具握把用多功能伞绳裹住。 这把武器以红色为外表，使用蜘蛛网图案的花纹进行了涂装，完毕后再配上了半光的表层。 留意你的脚步，你永远都不会知道蛛网撒在何处
